meta.title: The US Navy's new FRIGATE has a serious problem
meta.description:
Just weeks after cancelling its troubled Constellation-class frigate program, the Navy is ready to move forward with a new design — this time, based on the smaller but proven Legend-class National Security Cutter that, today, serves as the broadly-capable centerpiece of the U.S. Coast Guard’s fleet. 

But there are some big issues with this plan… Let’s talk about them. 

Watch our previous coverage on this program: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_B3VyWRmilg
